# Version 4.151.0
> **Skia m151 performance and platform** · [NuGet (prerelease)](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/4.151.0-preview)

> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](4.151.0/index.md) · [HarfBuzzSharp API diff](harfbuzzsharp/14.2.1/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0 updates to Skia m151 and eliminates allocations across several performance-critical hot paths. Color parsing, SKShaper glyph reads, and HarfBuzz shaping are reworked for zero-copy, allocation-free operation. A CPU raster regression introduced with the m151 sync is also corrected.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Skia updated to milestone m151** — Aligns the bundled renderer with Chrome milestone 151 and merges several rounds of upstream m151 bug fixes. ([#4294](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4294), [#4312](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4312), [#4382](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4382), [#4443](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4443))
- **CPU raster regression corrected** — Restores SK_ENABLE_LEGACY_SHADERCONTEXT so CPU-rasterised surfaces produce correct output after the m151 sync. ([#4428](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4428))

## API Surface

- **SKColor gains ReadOnlySpan<char> hex-parse overloads** — Adds ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads to SKColor hex parsing and optimises the internal path, removing a string allocation on every call. ([#4345](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4345))
- **SKShaper glyph results read via zero-copy spans** — GlyphRun data is now consumed through a Span<T> path rather than copying each element, reducing allocations during text layout. ([#4388](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4388))
- **GRContextOptions unsafe modifier removed** — Drops the unnecessary unsafe modifier from GRContextOptions, making it accessible from safe-only contexts without a compiler switch. ([#3991](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3991))

## Bug Fixes

- **Native resource leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData fixed** — SKImage.FromEncodedData(SKData, SKRectI) now releases the underlying native handle when the subset crop fails, preventing a handle leak. ([#3997](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3997))
- **Per-call allocation in SKFourByteTag.Parse eliminated** — Removes the char[4] heap allocation made on every SKFourByteTag.Parse call by inlining the character construction. ([#4396](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4396))

## Platform

- **Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries for .NET 11 WASM** — Adds the Emscripten 5.0.6 prebuilt libraries needed to target .NET 11's WASM runtime, keeping SkiaSharp usable on the next .NET WASM host. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#4459](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4459))

## HarfBuzzSharp 14.2.1

Removes per-call heap allocations in HarfBuzzSharp.Buffer.AddUtf8 via a pooled UTF-8 encoder and in HarfBuzzSharp.Tag.Parse by inlining the char array construction, making shaping hot paths allocation-free.

## Community Contributors ❤️

Thank you to everyone who contributed to this release!

| Contributor | Contributions |
|-------------|---------------|
| [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) | Added Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries for .NET 11 WASM, fixed the SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM redefinition in the Skia submodule, and built the cross-backend golden-image visual regression test harness ([#3788](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3788), [#4340](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4340), [#4459](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4459)) |

## Preview 2 (July 14, 2026)

Preview 2 landed the allocation-free SKShaper span path, the ReadOnlySpan<char> SKColor overloads, the GRContextOptions unsafe removal, HarfBuzz hot-path allocation fixes, and a batch of upstream m151 engine bug fixes.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.151.0-preview.1.1...v4.151.0-preview.2.1)

## Preview 1 (July 2, 2026)

Preview 1 opened the 4.151 line with the Skia m151 engine update and a fix to remove the SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM redefinition warning from WASM builds.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.150.1...v4.151.0-preview.1.1)
